choose.when: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT show_id as showId, title, venue_name as venueName, poster_url as posterUrl, start_date as startDate FROM show_tbl WHERE genre LIKE '%' || #{genre} || '%' ORDER BY start_date DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 20
choose.otherwise: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT show_id as showId, title, venue_name as venueName, poster_url as posterUrl, start_date as startDate FROM show_tbl WHERE genre LIKE '%대중음악%' ORDER BY start_date DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 10 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM ( SELECT show_id as showId, title, venue_name as venueName, poster_url as posterUrl, start_date as startDate FROM show_tbl WHERE genre LIKE '%뮤지컬%' ORDER BY start_date DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 8 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM ( SELECT show_id as showId, title, venue_name as venueName, poster_url as posterUrl, start_date as startDate FROM show_tbl WHERE genre LIKE '%연극%' ORDER BY start_date DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 7

mapper.select: SELECT show_id as showId, title, venue_name as venueName, poster_url as posterUrl, start_date as startDate FROM show_tbl WHERE start_date > SYSDATE ORDER BY start_date ASC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT a.*, ROWNUM rnum FROM ( SELECT show_id as showId, title, venue_name as venueName, start_date as startDate, genre, poster_url AS posterUrl FROM show_tbl WHERE
start_date >= SYSDATE
AND genre = '대중음악'
AND genre = '서양음악(클래식)'
AND genre = '무용(서양/한국무용)'
AND genre = '서커스/마술'
AND genre = '한국음악(국악)'
AND genre = '복합'
AND genre IN ('대중음악', '서양음악(클래식)', '복합', '무용(서양/한국무용)', '서커스/마술', '한국음악(국악)')
AND genre = '뮤지컬'
AND genre = '연극'
AND genre = '대중음악'
ORDER BY start_date ASC ) a
WHERE ROWNUM <= 12
)
WHERE rnum >= 1

SELECT s.show_id AS showId, s.title, s.venue_name AS venueName, s.start_date AS startDate, s.end_date AS endDate, s.poster_url AS posterUrl, s.genre, d.age_limit AS ageLimit, d.ticket_price AS ticketPrice, d.cast_info AS castInfo, d.styurl, d.runtime FROM show_tbl s LEFT OUTER JOIN showDetail_tbl d ON s.show_id = d.show_id WHERE s.show_id = #{showId}
SELECT schedule_id AS scheduleId, start_time as startTime, end_time as endTime FROM schedule_tbl WHERE show_id = #{showId} AND TO_CHAR(play_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') = #{playDate}
